untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Adam & Adam Double Top formation with two peaks of similar height) requires multi-candle pattern recognition logic that cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and simple comparison operators. The precise identification of peak structure, similarity measurement, and reversal confirmation requires pattern-matching algorithms beyond the scope of allowed indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Signal describes a visual/structural pattern rather than quantifiable indicator thresholds. Entry condition 'Formation of two peaks (Adam & Adam Double Top structure)' and exit condition 'Ultimate low reached' are qualitative pattern outcomes. Provided entry/exit approximations use price-pivot relationships and moving average reversals as proxies, but these do not capture the true pattern mechanics. Recommend implementing pattern detection in backtest engine separately or using untranslatable flag to signal custom pattern module.
